purpose: Independent starter skeleton for AI-Native E2E replay and harness assets.

directory_contract.cases: Replay case definitions and case-level assertions.
directory_contract.fixtures: Replay inputs, traces, snapshots, and golden references.
directory_contract.reports: Generated assertion reports, diffs, and run metadata.

non_goals: Do not host business workflow runtime here.
Do not mix report outputs into source truth.
Do not depend on the minimal-files-engine runtime objects.
